arts.ttl: Inside the Middlesbrough dressing room as pool, darts and coffee club builds team spirit
arts.sum: Taking us behind-the-scenes at Rockliffe after a recent Boro On The Road event in Redcar, Dael Fry said: “Last night we were talking about playing pool and the craic in the dressing room. While there are obviously more serious moments at Rockliffe when it’s time to get down to business - whether that be on the training pitches, analysts rooms or team meetings - but there’s a lighter side too.

arts.ttl: Leeds United news: Is Ramazani actually bad in duels?
arts.sum: Despite not kicking a ball against Luton Town, Leeds United winger Largie Ramazani was still criticised by Daniel Farke in sharing why the winger wasn’t chosen off the bench. As they looked for a winner, many fans wondered why Largie Ramazani was again overlooked for a role in Leeds’ attack, unused as Patrick Bamford, Brenden Aaronson, Sam Byram, Max Wöber and Isaac Schmidt were all called into action instead.

arts.ttl: Leeds United summer transfer move for Championship star hinges on one key factor
arts.sum: "He’s a player that if Leeds, for whatever reason, don’t get promoted this season, I wouldn’t be surprised if I saw him at Elland Road next year in the Championship," Robinson told MOT Leeds News . “You can’t afford to take risks on players when you’re going up to the Premier League in your first season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United’s chances of promotion updated after another dismal weekend
arts.sum: Leeds’ draw means that they drop out of the automatic promotion places as they moved within a point of Sheffield United, who lost away at Oxford United, but both moved down a place thanks to Burnley’s victory away at Coventry City. Leeds United are now on just one win in six games to see them drop out of the automatic promotion places with Burnley winning at Coventry City.

arts.ttl: Surprising Leeds United verdict as Championship supercomputer changes verdict on promotion race
arts.sum: Leeds may only have a 29 per cent chance of winning the Championship title now after dropping two further points at Luton Town to fall out the top two, but they are still given a 67 per cent probability of winning automatic promotion, which is significantly higher than second-placed Sheffield United. Yes, Leeds are still sat in a strong position and still have promotion in their own hands if they win all their remaining games, but sitting out of the top two and the automatic promotion places is a tough pill to swallow right now after a season of leading the way for the most part.

Tommy Conway and Samuel Illing-Junior both found the back of the net inside the opening eight minutes against Blackburn on Friday night as the Teessiders inflicted more misery on a dejected Ewood Park...
